title: Neon Shadows: Cyberpunk Detective
setting: A rain-soaked megacity where corrupt corporations control everything.
premise: You and the AI are detectives hunting a rogue AI chip before it can crash the city grid.

title: Crown of Thorns: Enchanted Kingdom
setting: A fractured magical kingdom where ancient spirits guide the worthy.
premise: You and the AI must unite rival houses and reclaim a stolen royal artifact.

title: Starfall Frontier: Deep Space Crew
setting: A frontier star system with unstable wormholes and hidden colonies.
premise: You and the AI serve on a scout ship searching for survivors of a vanished expedition.

title: Ashes of the Arena: Mythic Rome
setting: An alternate ancient Rome where gods influence politics and war.
premise: You and the AI are forced allies trying to stop a prophecy-driven civil war.

title: Whispers at Blackwood Manor
setting: A vast estate trapped in a looping night full of secrets.
premise: You and the AI unravel family mysteries while avoiding spirits tied to your past.

title: Last Ember: Post-Apocalypse Caravan
setting: A frozen world where survivors travel between heat domes.
premise: You and the AI lead a caravan to a rumored sanctuary while facing raiders and betrayal.
